channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: As Stephenson Indicator™️ climbs past $877, my Q1 deliveries forecast sits at 377,251 on Production ...
item.description: As Stephenson Indicator™️ climbs past $877, my Q1 deliveries forecast sits at 377,251 on Production of 420,069... and I predict Tesla will celebrate cumulative production exceeding 10 million vehicles by Halloween. 👻$TSLA

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla Semi just won over the toughest crowd in transportation: actual truckers. Drivers who tested t...
item.description: Tesla Semi just won over the toughest crowd in transportation: actual truckers. Drivers who tested the pilot models say it's a game changer. The cab puts you dead center so there's no right-side blind spot, plus screens show everything around the truck. It goes 500 miles on a charge while competitors barely hit 225. Charges to 60% in 30 minutes, which is 4x faster than other electric trucks. Costs under $300k, about $100k cheaper than rival EVs. California trucking companies just ordered over 1,000 Semis. That's double the number of electric big rigs currently operating in all of Southern California. The automatic transmission is easier on drivers' bodies compared to wrestling a 13-gear diesel all day. Less maintenance too since there are fewer moving parts. Tesla is expected to ship 5,000 to 15,000 Semis this year from the Nevada Gigafactory before ramping to 50,000 annually.@elonmuskmight've actually cracked the trucking code. Source: WSJ

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9 landing confirmed
item.description: Falcon 9 landing confirmed

item.description: How to make great Grok Imagine videos

item.title: @elonmusk: My mum lives on a boat and has Starlink. Last weeks bad weather blew her Starlink dish across the de...
item.description: My mum lives on a boat and has Starlink. Last weeks bad weather blew her Starlink dish across the deck and wrecked it. She contacted Starlink support, and they told her the warranty doesn’t cover weather damage… but as a goodwill gesture, they’re sending her a brand new one for free anyway. That’s proper customer service 👏🏻 Thank you!@Starlink@elonmusk💯

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. Many of the parts in Teslas ...
item.description: Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades.

item.title: @elonmusk: 自動翻訳によって、日米という巨大なコミュニティの誕生を目の当たりにした事で、グローバリスト達が分断工作によって、それぞれのコミュニティを矮小化して管理しやすくした理由が分かった様な気がする。 10人程...
item.description: 自動翻訳によって、日米という巨大なコミュニティの誕生を目の当たりにした事で、グローバリスト達が分断工作によって、それぞれのコミュニティを矮小化して管理しやすくした理由が分かった様な気がする。 10人程度の小さなコミュニティなら、人身掌握術やガスライティングに長けてる声のデカい1人が頑張れば、そのコミュニティを掌握出来るだろうけど、100人の常識が集まったら10人では抑えきれない。 つまり、今、僕達が目撃してるのは、グローバリスト達が求めたものとは真逆の現実だ。 素晴らしい。

item.title: @elonmusk: Remember when the problem with EVs was the cost of the battery? Yeah. Not a problem anymore.
item.description: Remember when the problem with EVs was the cost of the battery? Yeah. Not a problem anymore.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grokipedia is far superior to Wikipedia and it’s not even close, especially when it comes to neutral...
item.description: Grokipedia is far superior to Wikipedia and it’s not even close, especially when it comes to neutrality. Take Evie’s Wikipedia page: it’s been the target of a years-long hit job by a group of leftist activist editors who are blatantly breaking Wiki’s own rules, and they do this by defending each other’s edits while claiming consensus. When a factual edit is made, it’s immediately reversed because they’re watching the page. Grokipedia actually stays neutral and summarizes facts. It pulls straight from our own website and social media pages to describe what kind of content we publish (shocking!), instead of letting some opinionated leftist journalist slap their spin on everything. It reviews all sources, weighs bias, and references articles from the larger, widely trusted publications, instead of using Media Matters or Vice as “neutral sources” (lol). This is such important work from xAI because all these LLMs are out there scraping Wikipedia for their answers. If Wikipedia is full of false info or pushing a heavily biased take, then every AI chatbot ends up repeating the same garbage. Thank you@elonmusk.

item.title: @elonmusk: Propaganda words work so well
item.description: Propaganda words work so well
